title: [Lopunny] Battle Guide
summary: A base 105 Speed [fake-out] [support] with [drain-punch] [recover]y and [u-turn] [pivot] utility that still earns a slot without Mega Evolution.
strengths: Base 105 Speed gives reliable [fake-out] initiative turn one
[limber] grants paralysis immunity, making [Lopunny] a strong answer to status spam
[drain-punch] and [u-turn] let [Lopunny] stay healthy and keep momentum flowing
weaknesses: Base 76 Atk is below wallbreaker thresholds without Mega Evolution
2x [Fighting] weakness with only 65/84/96 bulk folds to super-effective hits
[fake-out] and [return] are both worthless into [Ghost] types

recommendedMoves.reason: is the guaranteed turn-zero flinch that anchors the [support] role

keeps [pivot] chains alive and scouts incoming switches

bodyMarkdown:
## Overview
Base-form [Lopunny] is one of the rare [Normal] types in the format that can earn a real slot outside of its Mega role. Base 105 Speed, [fake-out], and [u-turn] combine to make it a genuine tempo-control [pivot] — the goal is not to break walls but to buy setup turns and scout the opposing team. You bring base-form [Lopunny] when you want the flexibility of not committing to Mega Evolution immediately.

## Strengths
Base 105 Speed sits above most of the unboosted metagame, so [fake-out] triggers reliably on turn one and creates the free setup turn your cleaner needs. [u-turn] makes losing matchups cheap because [Lopunny] just exits on the damage step instead of trading. [limber] shuts off paralysis entirely, which is significant in tiers where [thunder-wave] chip is a common form of disruption. [drain-punch] gives real coverage into [Rock], [Dark], and [Steel] walls while keeping HP topped off.

## Weaknesses & Answers
Base 76 Atk is the limiting factor — [Lopunny] cannot actually break walls, only harass them. 65/84/96 defenses look workable on paper, but with a 2x [Fighting] weakness any [close-combat] or [drain-punch] from the opponent removes most of [Lopunny]'s HP bar in one hit. [Ghost] types walk in and ignore both [fake-out] and [return], so the set completely collapses against any [Ghost] [pivot] that is not answered by [drain-punch] or [u-turn].

## Recommended Moveset
[fake-out] is a locked slot — skipping it deletes the main reason to run base [Lopunny]. [return] is the primary STAB, scaling off max happiness for steady unresisted damage. [drain-punch] is the [Fighting] coverage slot and the only reliable HP recovery on the set, so it double-dips as both offense and sustain. [u-turn] is the [pivot] closer, letting [Lopunny] exit bad matchups without giving up tempo. An [encore] variant works as a meta answer to heavy setup teams.

## Item · Ability · Tera
[sitrus-berry] is the default item; combined with [drain-punch] it absorbs a hit and tops [Lopunny]'s HP back to a workable range mid-match. [silk-scarf] is the more aggressive pick when you want [return] to close kill ranges directly. [limber] is the correct ability because the other options do nothing against the meta, and status immunity is actively valuable. For Tera, [Fighting] is the best overall pick — it scrubs the [Fighting] weakness, deepens [drain-punch], and keeps [return] as STAB thanks to [Normal] typing underneath.

## Teammates & Synergy
[Lopunny]'s job is to buy a turn for a setup ace, so pair it with [dragon-dance], [belly-drum], or [swords-dance] sweepers that can turn one free action into a snowball. A slow U-turn or Volt Switch [pivot] behind [Lopunny] keeps momentum flowing into your wincon. Include a [Dark] type to pressure [Ghost] pivots, since that matchup is [Lopunny]'s main dead zone.

## Play Patterns
Lead with [Lopunny] to land [fake-out] on the opposing lead, then branch by matchup — [return] into soft targets, [drain-punch] into [Steel] or [Rock], [u-turn] out of anything that brings a [Ghost]. Keep HP above half whenever possible; [Lopunny] is a [support] unit, not a fight-to-the-last piece. Save the Mega Evolution for the Mega-form entry — the base form is the one you bring when the team composition prefers flexibility over raw damage.
